title: TAC-OPS REIMAGINED
description: This project is TAC-OPS REIMAGINED so basically I've recreated the TAC-OPS server for everyone to enjoy and I've also created the modpack for easier access!
body:
🪖 TAC-OPS: Tactical Combat & Operations Modpack (Minecraft 1.20.1)
TAC-OPS is a high-intensity, squad-based modpack built for players who crave tactical combat, realistic gunplay, and strategic base-building. Designed for private servers and multiplayer missions, this modpack transforms Minecraft into a battlefield of coordination, engineering, and firepower.

🔫 Core Features
Custom Gun Mechanics: Realistic reloads, aiming, cooldowns, and synced animations using the TACZ framework

Gunpack Integration: Includes tacz_default_gun with balanced weapons and immersive effects

Create Mod Engineering: Build automated defenses, traps, and mechanical contraptions to support your squad

Performance Boosts: Includes ModernFix and other optimization mods for smooth gameplay

Squad-Ready Setup: Perfect for LAN-style play or remote multiplayer using Aternos.

🎯 Why Play TAC-OPS?
Whether you're storming enemy bunkers or defending your base with turrets and traps, TAC-OPS delivers a unique blend of tactical shooter mechanics and Minecraft creativity. It’s ideal for small teams who want a modded experience that feels like a mission — not just a sandbox.

🛠 Requirements
Minecraft Java Edition 1.20.1

Modrinth App (recommended for easy install)

Compatible with private servers and LAN-style play  V 1.0.0.To Join the TAC-OPS REIMAGINED server I made go to multiplayer (with the modpack installed) then click direct connection after that enter this in the IP Address: TACOPSREIMAGINED.aternos.me   (without space and semi colon)  Also if you would like to know when the server turns on and off and updates and more then join my discord server [Discord Invite](https://discord.gg/ZWFrXVRU9F)           SERVER ON/OFF NOTIFICATIONS ARE NOW ON THE DISCORD SERVER
